mapper.select: select vai.id, vendor_id, account, vi.vendor_description, vai.password, vendor_email, vendor_phone, vendor_url, vendor_name, nick_name as manager from vendor_account_information vai left join vendor_information vi on vai.vendor_id = vi.id left join sys_user on vai.create_user = sys_user.user_id where vai.id = #{id} and vai.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into vendor_account_information(id, vendor_id, account, password, vendor_email, vendor_phone, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id}, #{vendorId}, #{account}, #{password}, #{vendorEmail}, #{vendorPhone}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into vendor_account_information(id,vendor_id, account, password, vendor_email, vendor_phone, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.vendorId}, #{entity.account}, #{entity.password}, #{entity.vendorEmail}, #{entity.vendorPhone}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into vendor_account_information(id,vendor_id, account, password, vendor_email, vendor_phone, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.vendorId}, #{entity.account}, #{entity.password}, #{entity.vendorEmail}, #{entity.vendorPhone}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update vendor_id = values(vendor_id), account = values(account), password = values(password), vendor_email = values(vendor_email), vendor_phone = values(vendor_phone), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
